mnemonics: PLOT Your Mobile App: Plan, Launch, Optimize, Test
keyPoints: Master the complete mobile app development lifecycle from ideation to deployment
Implement platform-specific UI/UX design principles for iOS and Android
Integrate backend services, APIs, and database management for functional apps
commonMistakes: Neglecting performance optimization leading to slow, battery-draining apps
Poor error handling and inadequate testing across different devices and OS versions
Ignoring platform-specific design guidelines (HIG/Material Design) creating poor UX
